Grid.TextBlock: CINCPACFLT PEARL HARBOR HI 81 WING (PROVISIONAL) RAAF SANDAKAN MALAYSIA

TOP SECRET
1. (S) SITUATION: Following successful operations in Indonesia, Allied efforts have shifted north towards recapture of Palawan, where enemy forces have been entrenched since July. The Allied base at Sandakan, Malaysia, is being used as a staging base for further operations. National technical means indicate enemy intends imminent spoiling attack against Sandakan to delay offensive operations.
2. (S) MISSION: U.S. and Allied forces in vicinity of Sandakan will repel enemy air/surface attack.
3. (S) EXECUTION: {TaskForceName} will assume tactical control of local defense and coordinate all assets to defeat enemy attack. Priority defense is Allied auxiliaries anchored in Sandakan Harbor. Enemy bomb or missile attacks against these units must be prevented. Destroy all enemy forces attacking Sandakan.
4. (TS) THREAT: Compartmented source STAR LIGHT at Puerto Princesa reports enemy surface forces sortieing to attack Sandakan. PLAN missile boats were sighted moving along the coast supported by JIANGHU class FFs, and last satellite pass showed LUDA class DDs moving southeast in Sulu Sea. Enemy submarines have been reported and air attack from Puerto Princesa and Cam Ranh is highly likely.
5. (S) ALLIED FORCES: Philippine Navy frigate DIEGO SILANG will attach to {TaskForceName} and has been refitted with Harpoons. Allied air will operate from the field at Sandakan. HAWK battery near Sandakan Harbor will provide local SAM coverage.
6. (S) REMARKS: Ensure the Allied base at Sandakan remains intact. Good luck and good hunting. CTF 77 sends.
SECRET
DECL OADR BT
